XSS.description: XSS indicates lack of secure coding practices and input validation
XSS.requirement: Organizations shall apply secure coding principles to software development

SQL Injection.description: SQL injection indicates lack of input sanitization in code
SQL Injection.requirement: Input validation and parameterized queries must be enforced

Command Injection.description: Command injection indicates critical secure coding failure
Command Injection.requirement: OS command calls must be avoided or strictly validated

Missing Security Header.description: Missing headers indicate improper security configuration
Missing Security Header.requirement: Security configurations must be established and maintained

Sensitive File Exposed.description: Exposed files violate access restriction controls
Sensitive File Exposed.requirement: Access to information must be restricted per access control policy

Information Disclosure.requirement: Systems must be hardened to prevent unnecessary information disclosure

Directory Listing Enabled.description: Directory listing exposes internal file structure
Directory Listing Enabled.requirement: Web servers must be configured to disable directory browsing
